# IDWT — Infinite-Dimensional Wave Theory

> A unified physical framework by Fedge No (2026). Everything is a complex Dirac spinor wave (Ψ∞) on an infinite-dimensional manifold of macroscopic spatial dimensions. All Standard Model particles, masses, coupling constants, and mixing angles emerge from geometry — fixed by three integer seeds (n_d=1, n_u=3, n_s=4) and one mass unit (the electron mass). No free parameters. The observer lives at d=3, inside M_∞.

Contact: fedge-no@hotmail.com
Parts DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19767493

## Core Theory (the 11 Parts)

The framework is developed across 11 Parts, available as markdown source and searchable via the Notebook.

- [Notebook — search and read all 11 Parts](https://fedgeno.github.io/notebook/)
- [Published documents](https://fedgeno.github.io/published/)
- [README / executive summary](https://fedgeno.github.io/README.md)

## Key Concepts

- [What Is IDWT?](https://fedgeno.github.io/articles/what-is-idwt.html): Overview of the framework and its central claims.
- [One Wave](https://fedgeno.github.io/articles/one-wave.html): The master spinor field Ψ∞ as the sole fundamental object.
- [The Simplex Number](https://fedgeno.github.io/articles/simplex-number.html): The mass formula S(n,d) — mass as a count of hidden microstates.
- [The Six Sectors](https://fedgeno.github.io/articles/sectors.html): How d=2,3,4,5,6,10 sector geometry generates the Standard Model families.
- [The Prism](https://fedgeno.github.io/articles/prism.html): How a single wave refracts into the particle spectrum.
- [The Particle Map](https://fedgeno.github.io/articles/particle-map.html): Every Standard Model particle placed in the sector structure.
- [Predictions](https://fedgeno.github.io/articles/predictions.html): Falsifiable predictions, including Dirac neutrinos and zero neutrinoless double beta decay.
- [What Would Falsify IDWT](https://fedgeno.github.io/articles/falsifiables.html): The theory's empirical commitments.
